name: workflow state contract _resumable boolean field controls whether the session can be resumed after restart
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"session_id":"s1","_resumable":true}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/validate-state-contract.sh" --state .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json --check resumable 2>out.txt && grep -q 'resumable=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
